description_long: This object depicts an adult human figure in a prone, horizontal flying position, with arms and legs extended backward and a streamlined body posture. The figure is attached to a large, wing-like structure that extends from the arms and legs, resembling a hang glider or a wingsuit, with elongated, angular surfaces. The head is visible and features short, curly hair, and the face is oriented forward as if in flight. The wings are broad and taper to points, with a smooth, aerodynamic appearance and subtle surface shading. The overall form is sleek and dynamic, suggesting rapid movement through the air. The figure appears to be wearing a fitted suit that integrates seamlessly with the wing apparatus.
description: An adult human figure in a streamlined flying pose, integrated with a large, angular wing structure resembling a hang glider or wingsuit. The figure is prone, with arms and legs extended backward and a fitted suit blending into the wings.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from above and slightly to the side, highlighting the full span of the wings and the streamlined body posture.
description_view_1: A side view showing the head, face, and the integration of the body with the wing structure, emphasizing the aerodynamic form.
description_view_2: A rear-side view focusing on the back of the wings and the attachment points to the legs and arms, with less visibility of the head.
description_view_3: A frontal angle showing the head, face, and the forward extension of the wings, with the body and limbs visible in a flying pose.
attribute_clothing_type: aerodynamic fitted suit with integrated wing apparatus
attribute_posture: prone flying position with limbs extended backward
